name: korean-ux-copy
description: Audit and improve user-facing Korean UX copy in codebases. Detects 15 anti-patterns (KA-100–KA-152) with 73% detection rate on GPT-generated Korean SaaS copy. Produces one Kanana-powered, conversion-safe rewrite per finding.

interface.shortDescription: Turn awkward Korean UX copy into safer, sharper rewrites.
interface.longDescription: Audit Korean user-facing copy in codebases, classify UI surfaces by role (hero, CTA, error, empty state, form helper), and suggest one Kanana-powered conversion-safe rewrite per finding. 15 anti-patterns detected with 73% hit rate on GPT-generated Korean SaaS fixtures.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project's Korean UX copy. Do not edit files.
Find AI-like Korean copy and show safe dry-run diffs.
Use Benefit Hook Lift and Kanana to rewrite high-impact Korean copy surfaces (hero, CTA, pricing, SEO).
